UseClevr Hybrid Runtime downloads
---------------------------------

Place platform installer artifacts here to enable direct downloads from the web app.

Linux (first target):
- UseClevr-Hybrid-Runtime.AppImage

Optional future targets:
- UseClevr-Hybrid-Runtime.dmg (macOS)
- UseClevr-Hybrid-Runtime-Setup.exe (Windows)

These files will be served at:
- /downloads/UseClevr-Hybrid-Runtime.AppImage
- /downloads/UseClevr-Hybrid-Runtime.dmg
- /downloads/UseClevr-Hybrid-Runtime-Setup.exe

Do not add sensitive files. This folder is publicly served by Next.js.
